---
id: list-instruments
title: "List instruments"

  as={"h1"}

</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/instruments"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all instruments. Supports type filtering and identifier typeahead lookup via q/identifier_kind/limit.
